name: workspace_manager
description: Read workspace files (rooms, skills, client context) or list learned knowledge entries. Use this tool to load task-specific instructions before responding.

action.description: Action to perform: read a workspace file, or list learned knowledge entries

path.description: Relative path within the workspace (for read action), e.g. rooms/executive-briefing.md

category.description: Knowledge category to list entries for (for list action). Omit to list all categories.
